name: Auto-Dismiss Cookie Banners
description: Automatically clicks 'Reject All' or dismiss buttons on cookie consent popups, then hides remaining banner elements

rules.js: (function(){function dismiss(){var selectors=['[id*="reject"]','[class*="reject"]','button[title*="Reject"]','a[title*="Reject"]','[id*="decline"]','[class*="decline"]','[data-testid*="reject"]','[data-testid*="decline"]','button[title*="Decline"]','[id*="deny"]','[class*="deny"]','[aria-label*="Reject"]','[aria-label*="Decline"]','[aria-label*="Deny"]','[id*="dismiss"]','[class*="dismiss"]','button.cc-deny','button.cc-dismiss','.cmp-reject-btn','#onetrust-reject-all-handler','.ot-pc-refuse-all-handler','#didomi-notice-disagree-button','.sp_choice_type_11','[data-choice="reject"]','button[mode="secondary"]'];for(var i=0;i<selectors.length;i++){var btns=document.querySelectorAll(selectors[i]);for(var j=0;j<btns.length;j++){var btn=btns[j];if(btn.offsetParent!==null&&btn.textContent.length<80){btn.click();return true;}}}return false;}var attempts=0;var interval=setInterval(function(){if(dismiss()||++attempts>10)clearInterval(interval);},800);})();

rules.css: #cookie-notice, #cookie-banner, #cookie-consent, .cookie-notice, .cookie-banner, .cookie-consent, .cookie-popup, .cookie-modal, .cookie-dialog, .cookie-law-info-bar, .cc-banner, .cc-window, .cc-dialog, .consent-banner, .consent-dialog, .consent-modal, .gdpr-banner, .gdpr-notice, .gdpr-popup, .privacy-notice, .privacy-banner, [class*='cookie-consent'], [class*='cookie-banner'], [class*='gdpr-'], [id*='cookie-consent'], [id*='cookie-banner'], [id*='gdpr-'], .qc-cmp-ui-container, .qc-cmp2-container, #qc-cmp2-main, .cmp-container, #onetrust-banner-sdk, #onetrust-consent-sdk, .onetrust-pc-dark-filter, #didomi-host, .didomi-popup-container, #sp_message_container, .sp_message_container, #usercentrics-root, .uc-banner, .cookiebot-widget, #CookiebotDialog, .iubenda-cs-container { display: none !important; visibility: hidden !important; opacity: 0 !important; pointer-events: none !important; }
body.modal-open, body.no-scroll, body.cookie-modal-open, body.has-cookie-notice, html.has-cookie-notice { overflow: auto !important; position: static !important; }
